topStories.description: Nearly 9.5 million people across the US Southwest face extreme high temperatures, as an ongoing heat wave continues to topple records and raise the risk of wildfires as far away as the Great Plains.

dailyNews.description: As per the space agency, residents reported seeing the luminous object at around 4:40 p.m. CDT, describing it as a streak racing across the sky. The meteor first became visible at an altitude of roughly 49 miles above Stagecoach, located northwest of Houston.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: HMS Anson, Britain's nuclear-powered submarine, arrives in the Arabian Sea, says report
dailyNews.description: HMS Anson, Britain's nuclear-powered submarine has arrived in the northern Arabian Sea as tensions in the Middle East soar. Equipped with Tomahawk missiles, the Royal Navy submarine left a port from Australia's Perth on 6 March, days after the US and Israel launched strikes against Iran

dailyNews.title: Iran claims it has shot down ‘invading’ US F-15 fighter jet near Hormuz Island: Watch video
dailyNews.description: Iran claims to have shot down an enemy F-15 fighter jet near Hormuz Island, with investigations ongoing. The US and other Middle Eastern nations have not commented on the situation, while Iranian media has released a video of the incident.

dailyNews.description: America shouldn’t fight a war like this.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration says it is ready to deport Abrego Garcia to Liberia
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has asked a federal judge to dissolve her order preventing ICE from deporting Kilmar Abrego Garcia to Liberia.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist TSA at airports as delays worsen
dailyNews.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

dailyNews.title: Iran warns of "irreversible damage" to region after Trump attack threat
dailyNews.description: President Trump's threat comes after CENTCOM's commander said that Iran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz had been "degraded."

dailyNews.title: Cory Booker: "We, the people, are the heroes this country needs"
dailyNews.description: The New Jersey Senator has been a face of the Democratic Party's resistance to the Trump administration. He expresses his hopes for our nation in a new book, "Stand," in which he encourages Americans to stand together, reminding us of our shared virtues.

dailyNews.title: In conversation with Cory Booker
dailyNews.description: New Jersey Senator Cory Booker has been a face of the Democratic Party's resistance to the Trump administration – from a record-breaking filibuster critical of the president's policies, to calls for accountability over U.S. involvement in the war with Iran. He also expresses his hopes for our nation in a new book, "Stand," in which he encourages Americans to stand together, reminding us of our shared virtues. He talks with Faith Salie about a political career forged in Newark, N.J. ("the toughest place in politics ever"), and how it is time to "seize, reclaim, and redeem the dream of America."

dailyNews.title: The prospects for "boots on the ground" to seize Iran's enriched uranium
dailyNews.description: As the war with Iran enters its fourth week, much of its stockpile of enriched uranium is believed to lie buried deep inside the Isfahan Mountain complex. CBS News national security correspondent David Martin talks with physicist David Albright, president of the Institute for Science and International Security, about the risks of seizing that near-weapon grade material.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens attack on Iran power plants if Strait of Hormuz isn't reopened
dailyNews.description: Iran and Israel traded attacks on Saturday as the war in the Middle East escalated into a dangerous new direction at the start of its fourth week.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
dailyNews.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.

dailyNews.title: Scott Bessent defends U.S. military actions in Iran: 'Sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate'
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent discusses the Trump Administration’s decision to remove sanctions on Iranian oil and talks about the cost of war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Cuban deputy FM reacts to Trump’s threats to take over Cuba: Full interview
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban Deputy Foreign Minister Carlos Fernández de Cossío says “our military is always prepared” but “we don't pose any threat to the United States” after President Trump threatened a U.S. takeover of Cuba.
